problem id: 5fead1a1
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(3) AND SHR(1)) XOR NOT SHR(5)

examples:
  11110001 -> 11110000
  01001011 -> 11111101
  10001010 -> 10111111
  00111001 -> 11110110
  11011000 -> 10111101
  00011010 -> 11111111
  01110011 -> 11100101
  01011011 -> 11110101

query: 10100000
predicted answer: 11111010
